title: Chronicles of Celestial Genesis
description: In this modpack you will spawn in modified world using Terralith, choose your origins, race, professon, also in future version is gonna be there skill tree ! Those will help you on your way of cleaning dimensions and beating final boss, the ender dragon.
body:
- Serverpack download: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Y1h88hGPu3ZoX155VHP8a2_iWUNtrT0K?usp=sharing
 
Welcome to the initial sketch of our modpack's narrative, with a promise of much more to unfold in the future!

# **The Genesis**
In this modpack, you'll materialize in a dynamically modified world shaped by the influences of Terralith and Tectonic. At the onset of your journey, the choices you make – your origin, race, profession, and blessing – will be pivotal in determining your path to survival!

## **The Unfolding Saga**
As participants in this tale, you are the progeny of the revered deity "Hosia." In the early chapters of our story, Hosia was a respected and blessed god who played a vital role in the creation of the universe, life, and the lost civilizations that once adorned the world with villages and cities. However, a pivotal error unfolded one fateful day – a pact made with another god that resulted in the near depletion of her powers.

This deceitful god, the mastermind behind undead, creepers, and the enigmatic realms like the Nether, Prison Landscape, and the End, tricked her and almost brought her to the brink of death. Although Hosia managed to escape, she found herself at the limits of her abilities. Recognizing her constraints, she wielded the last remnants of her power to erect barriers between dimensions, vanishing for a thousand years. The beginning of your journey marks the infusion of the final fragments of her soul into you, granting you the power to choose your origin and a mission to liberate the world from the clutches of ancient, cruel gods forged in the chaos of her disappearance.

### Upcoming Features! (Roadmap)
- Elevated Difficulty Levels for a Challenging Experience!
- A Vibrant Overworld Teeming with New Standard Enemies!
- A Revamped Skill Tree to Enhance Your Gameplay!
- Improved Optimization for a Seamless Gaming Experience!
- Progress into the Modern Age through Mod and Addon Development!
- Engage in a Quest System to Aid Your Conquest Against the Gods!
- Immerse Yourself in a Distinctive Custom Resource Pack!
